categories.label: Waxing
categories.description: Professional waxing using premium hot and warm wax. All treatments are patch-test friendly — please advise of any skin conditions at the time of booking.

services.name: Hollywood Wax
services.description: Complete intimate wax — front and back — leaving skin perfectly smooth. Uses gentle hot wax suitable for sensitive skin.

services.name: Brazilian Wax
services.description: A clean Brazilian leaving a small strip. Ideal for those who prefer a tidy, minimal-coverage look.

services.name: Bikini Wax
services.description: Cleans up the bikini line for a neat, comfortable finish. Perfect before holidays or special occasions.

services.name: Full Leg Wax
services.description: Smooth, hair-free legs from ankle to hip using warm strip wax. Long-lasting results.

services.name: Half Leg Wax
services.description: Wax from the knee down, or upper leg — your choice. Great as a standalone or combined with other treatments.

services.name: Underarm Wax
services.description: Quick, efficient underarm wax using hot wax for a clean, close finish with minimal discomfort.

services.name: Upper Lip Wax
services.description: A fast and precise upper lip wax using gentle hot wax, ideal for sensitive facial skin.

services.name: Eyebrow Wax & Shape
services.description: Expert brow shaping and waxing to frame your face beautifully.

services.name: Full Arm Wax
services.description: Smooth arms from wrist to shoulder using warm strip wax for long-lasting results.

categories.label: Pedicure
categories.description: Relaxing, professional pedicures carried out at your home. All tools are sanitised between clients and single-use items are used wherever possible.

services.name: Classic Pedicure
services.description: A thorough pedicure including soak, cuticle care, nail shaping, exfoliation, massage, and a polish of your choice.

services.name: Gel Pedicure
services.description: All the care of a classic pedicure with a long-lasting gel polish finish that stays chip-free for weeks.

services.name: Luxury Pedicure
services.description: An indulgent treat — extended massage, heated foot mask, exfoliation, cuticle care, and your choice of standard or gel polish.

services.name: Express Pedicure
services.description: A quick refresh — nail tidy, cuticle care, and a fresh coat of polish. Perfect for maintaining your look between full treatments.
